---
title: "test_trace_viz_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_trace_viz_empire.py"
loc: 25
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.10
style_score: 3.90
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.68
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_trace_renderer_isolation, test_trace_renderer_causal_chain. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.trace_viz](file://src.tools.trace_viz)
- [src.tools.trace_viz](file://src.tools.trace_viz)

### Exports
- `test_trace_renderer_isolation`
- `test_trace_renderer_causal_chain`
